texto: the California supreme court, following the English common-law, decided that the owner of land bordering a watercourse was entitled only to the usufruct of the water; that if he used it he must return it to its original course unimpaired in quality and undiminished in volume.
explicacao: Orientação direta de Jerome Hart sobre esforço, persistência e resultados. A afirmação “the California supreme court, following the English common-law, decided that the owner of land bo…” funciona como lembrete prático ligado a familia, california, water, útil em momentos de water.
